title: The Big Cheese Mouse & Rat Killer Pasta Sachet - 10g x 15 Kills Mice and Rats Pre-Measured Chew Through Sachets Difenacoum, Red
features: BAIT STATION REQUIRED: Use The Big Cheese Rat & Mouse Bait Station when baiting rats and mice with poisons, this is required by UK law
VERSATILE USE: Soft, tasty pasta bait stays clumped together Less crumbs and less mess make it an ideal bait for kitchens and food preparation areas to avoid cross-contamination
WHERE TO USE: Poison grain bait can be used indoors in the home or outdoors around buildings such as garden sheds, outbuildings, garages or greenhouses
HIGHLY PALATABLE BAIT: No spill rodent killer bait maximises bait-take to ensure a lethal dose to rats and mice Rats and mice chew through the sachet to get to the bait
GLOVES INCLUDED: To ensure safer handling and placement of the mouse and rat killer pasta sachets
VALUE-ADDED PACK: Multi-pack of 15 sachets allows for multiple coverage or repeated use

Fresh 'n Tasty trap bait paste from The Big Cheese increases the catch rate in all types of rodent traps including snap and cage traps. Re-bait up to 60 traps.
